{{Quote|What makes you so different?|Vharing on himself|<ref name="The Longest Fall">{{JournalCite|11|The Longest Fall}}</ref>}}
'''Jovan Vharing''' was [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Interrogator/Legends|''Interrogator'']].

==Biography==
Born into a family of high class and prominence, Vharing found himself joining the [[Imperial Naval Academy/Legends|Imperial Naval Academy]] by tradition rather than choice, though he did not regret the decision.<ref name="The Longest Fall" />

Initially clumsy with self-doubt around orders and his superiors, his early fears of being overwhelmed were soon extinguished with pride and ambition and was rewarded when he graduated the Academy in the top two percent of his class.<ref name="The Longest Fall" />

Commissioned as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], Vharing was assigned to a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] as a senior tracking officer gaining attention for his abilities, most notably from Captain [[Nolaan]]. Having also served in the Outer Rim, Nolaan took an instant liking to the man and positioned himself as mentor and friend. For this Vharing's stay there was brief.<ref name="The Longest Fall" />

Nolaan didn't hide his bias and, to spite his subordinates, began calling in favors that brought Vharing to the [[Interrogator/Legends|''Interrogator'']] where Nolaan was serving under the direct command of [[High Inquisitor]] [[Antinnis Tremayne]].<ref name="The Longest Fall" />

Within a year Nolaan was dead and Vharing found himself becoming one the youngest captains ever but, like his predecessor, a buffer between the wrath of the Inquisitor and the rest of the officers.<ref name="The Longest Fall" />

While he was sleeping, one of Vharing's ambitious subordinates, [[Leeds]], intercepted an unusual signal matching an early [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] frequency coming from the planet [[Qlothos]]. Leeds ordered an [[Attack on Qlothos|attack]] but mistakes in the operation resulted in the death of around sixty prominent [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] citizens.<ref name="The Longest Fall" />

Vharing was brought into Tremayne's waiting room and after three hours on his feet the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] appeared. The captain felt his throat tighten and in the grip of Tremayne's [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force choke|Force choke]] his neck was crushed and he collapsed to the floor. His corpse dragged away by two [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]].<ref name="The Longest Fall" />

And so Vharing was dead, an unblemished career ended due to a error that was not his own.<ref name="The Longest Fall" />
